name: What's the first step after seeing my article in Perplexity answers?

mainEntity.name: What's the first step after seeing my article in Perplexity answers?

acceptedAnswer.description: Screenshot everything, note query/date, register copyright if unregistered.[2] Then cease-and-desist.[1][3] Key factors: Preserve chain of custody. Avoid querying more (spoliation risk). NY suits started similarly. Lawyer up fast. Prevents defense 'you consented'.
